digest.en: Russia targeted Ukraine in an overnight drone attack, with parts of the drones found in Romania. The US is allowing the Venezuelan government to cover Maduro's lawyer fees. Britain is courting Trump with King Charles.
digest.hi: ईरान और खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है। ईरान ने इन कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा बदल दी है। इस तनाव के कारण दुनिया भर में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं।

articles.title: Russia Targets Ukraine In Overnight Drone Attack, Parts Found In Romania
articles.summary: Russian drones crashed in Ukraine and Romania, prompting evacuations and a police cordon in Galati. The incident marks the latest escalation in the ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine. Details of the attack remain unclear.

articles.title: Tottenham and West Ham both win, as heated battle to avoid relegation continues
articles.summary: Tottenham and West Ham both won their respective matches, maintaining their positions in the Premier League relegation battle. The victories came as a result of strong performances from both teams, with Tottenham defeating Southampton 3-1 and West Ham beating Everton 2-0.

articles.title: Pentagon Floats Suspending Spain From NATO in Leaked Email Fallout
articles.summary: The Pentagon considered suspending Spain from NATO membership in a leaked email, citing concerns over the country's military cooperation with Russia. The proposal was reportedly made in response to Spain's decision to purchase Russian-made military equipment.

articles.title: Britain courts Trump with King Charles
articles.summary: King Charles met with former US President Donald Trump during a state visit to the US, aiming to repair strained US-UK relations. The British monarch's visit comes as the two nations seek to strengthen their diplomatic ties and address shared concerns.

articles.title: Trump Cancels Top Officials' Pakistan Trip For Iran Talks
articles.summary: US officials cancelled a trip to Pakistan for Iran talks, hours after Iranian Foreign Minister departed Islamabad. The decision was made by former US President Donald Trump, who had planned to send a delegation to Pakistan for diplomatic discussions with Iran.

articles.title: US to allow Venezuelan government to cover Maduro’s lawyer fees
articles.summary: The US will cover Venezuelan President Maduro's lawyer fees. Defence lawyers claimed Maduro's rights were violated after a US abduction. Defence lawyers had asked for case to be thrown out, claiming Maduro's rights were violated following US abduction.

articles.title: Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run
articles.summary: Palhinha scored a late goal for Tottenham at Wolves. The win ended Tottenham's winless run. Palhinha scores late Tottenham goal at Wolves to end winless run.

articles.title: Wilson's late winner boosts West Ham's survival chances with 2-1 win over Everton
articles.summary: Wilson scored a late winner for West Ham against Everton. The 2-1 win boosted West Ham's survival chances. Wilson's late winner boosts West Ham's survival chances with 2-1 win over Everton.

articles.title: Punjab pull off record chase against Delhi despite Rahul ton
articles.summary: Punjab pulled off a record chase against Delhi in a cricket match despite a century from Rahul. The team's victory was a surprise upset in a highly anticipated match. Punjab pull off record chase against Delhi despite Rahul ton.

articles.title: Olise and Kane lead Bayern comeback from three goals down in 4-3 win at Mainz
articles.summary: Olise and Kane led Bayern's comeback against Mainz. Bayern won 4-3 after being three goals down. Olise and Kane lead Bayern comeback from three goals down in 4-3 win at Mainz.

articles.title: Taliban Government says Afghans in Qatar can return 'with full confidence'
articles.summary: The Taliban government told Afghans in Qatar they can return with full confidence. The US aims to move Afghans to a third country. A U. S.

articles.title: Indigenous Speakers Are Booed During Commemorations of Australia’s War Dead
articles.summary: Australia's Anzac Day dawn services were disrupted in three cities by hecklers targeting Aboriginal customs. Dawn services for Anzac Day were disrupted in three cities. The hecklers seemed to be targeting a widespread Aboriginal custom meant to acknowledge the land’s original inhabitants.

articles.title: Explosions and gunfire as armed groups launch co-ordinated attacks across Mali
articles.summary: Armed groups launched co-ordinated attacks across Mali, sparking explosions and gunfire in the centre and north. The attacks are described as the largest jihadist assault in years, with witnesses reporting clashes.

articles.title: Iran’s Foreign Minister leaves Islamabad without meeting U.S. envoys, say Pakistan officials
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister met Pakistan's Army chief and resumed commercial flights from Tehran's airport. Iran resumes commercial flights from Tehran’s international airport for the first time since the conflict with the U. S.

articles.title: Japan’s New Care Workers: Bodybuilders, Wrestlers and M.M.A. Fighters
articles.summary: Japan recruits athletes to work in nursing homes due to staff shortages. Young athletes are being recruited to plug a staff shortage in Japan’s nursing homes. The results are reshaping elder care.

articles.title: Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions
articles.summary: China demands removal of its entities from Russia sanctions lists. China demanded an immediate removal of Chinese entities from the sanctions list. Beijing Warns Europe As Chinese Entities Included In Russia Sanctions.

articles.title: Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico.eu
articles.summary: Paris and Athens exchanged mutual defense pledges. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil politico. eu. Paris and Athens exchange mutual defense pledges amid geopolitical turmoil - politico. eu.

articles.title: Mali hit by wave of coordinated attacks from armed groups
articles.summary: Mali's capital Bamako was hit by coordinated attacks from armed groups. Gunfire and explosions have rocked Mali's capital Bamako and other key cities in one of the most significant coordinated attacks in years, as armed groups, including jihadist insurgents and separatist rebels exploit worsening insecurity in the Sahel region.

articles.title: Brazil's Militao risks missing World Cup with hamstring injury, sources say
articles.summary: Brazil's Eder Militao may miss the World Cup due to a hamstring injury. Sources indicate the injury could keep him out of the tournament. Brazil's Militao risks missing World Cup with hamstring injury, sources say.

articles.title: African governments need to take urgent action on fertiliser shortages
articles.summary: Fertiliser shortages threaten African harvests due to slowed shipments from the Strait of Hormuz. Governments face urgent calls to address the issue. Tensions in the Strait of Hormuz have slowed fertiliser shipments which could put harvests at risk.

articles.title: US Modifies Sanctions, Allows Venezuela To Pay For Nicolas Maduro's Lawyer
articles.summary: The US modified sanctions to allow Venezuela to pay for lawyer representing Nicolas Maduro. The change comes after Maduro and his wife were taken by US special forces. Maduro and his wife were captured from their home in Caracas by US special forces on January 3.

articles.title: ईरान ने खाड़ी देशों में अमेरिकी टेक कंपनियों को निशाना बनाकर जंग की परिभाषा कैसे बदली?

articles.title: ईरान में फ़ैसले कौन ले रहा है- पेज़ेश्कियान, ग़ालिबाफ़ या आईआरजीसी

articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। यह चेतावनी एक रिपोर्ट में दी गई है। दुनिया पर इसके प्रभाव की आशंका जताई जा रही है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।

articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने पर भारत की प्रतिक्रिया संतुलित रही. विपक्षी पार्टी कांग्रेस ने मोदी सरकार की प्रतिक्रिया को 'बेहद कमज़ोर' बताया. अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति के भारत को 'धरती पर नरक' कहे जाने वाले पोस्ट को लेकर कई प्रतिक्रियाएं आ रही हैं.

articles.title: पश्चिम एशिया तनाव से क्यों कांपा पाकिस्तान?: युद्ध में नहीं फिर भी हो रहा बर्बाद, जानिए क्या कहती
articles.summary: पाकिस्तान पश्चिम एशिया तनाव के कारण प्रभावित हो रहा है, भले ही वह युद्ध में शामिल नहीं है। एक रिपोर्ट के अनुसार, इस तनाव के कारण पाकिस्तान को नुकसान हो रहा है। इसके प्रभावों पर रिपोर्ट में चर्चा की गई है।

articles.title: विश्व में बढ़ते युद्ध: कब थमेगा ये संघर्ष?
articles.summary: विश्व में युद्धों की संख्या बढ़ रही है, लेकिन यह स्पष्ट नहीं है कि ये संघर्ष कब थमेंगे। विभिन्न देशों के बीच तनाव और मतभेदों के कारण युद्ध की स्थिति बनी हुई है।

articles.title: युद्ध-संघर्ष... यूएन चार्टर में शांति स्थापना का जिक्र, विदेश मंत्री जयशंकर ने दुनिया के सामने रखी
articles.summary: विदेश मंत्री जयशंकर ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र चार्टर में शांति स्थापना के महत्व पर जोर दिया और दुनिया के सामने 7 चिंताएं रखीं। उन्होंने युद्ध और संघर्षों को रोकने के लिए 국제 समुदाय से सहयोग की अपील की।
